subcodes.first_line: O ye two loving brothers! Render thanks unto God that ye are brothers both in body and soul, born of the same father and mother [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو برادر مهرپرور حمد کنید خدا را که بجسم و جان برادرید و از یک پدر و مادر
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
